top_signals.title: Oil prices fall as market bets U.S.-Iran fighting won't escalate into wider war
top_signals.summary: Oil prices turned lower on Thursday after the U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump can halt trade with Spain using law behind scrapped tariffs: Greer
top_signals.summary: Trump asserted that IEEPA authorized him to slap tariffs on nearly every country on earth, but the Supreme Court struck down those import duties.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dronemaker Helsing Alters Staff Stock Plan Before Funding Round
top_signals.summary: European defense startup Helsing has overhauled its internal share program, alienating some staff as the company finalizes its biggest funding round to date.
